overview: AI-powered Assignment Intelligence System — a smart academic productivity tool that predicts optimal start dates, scores task priority using weighted formulas, and plans your daily study focus. All logic runs client-side with localStorage persistence.
features: Smart priority scoring engine (0–100) with urgency, difficulty, and risk factors
Optimal start date prediction with procrastination buffer and weekend skips
Assignment dashboard with urgency badges, color-coded cards, filters, and sorting
Add assignment slide-over form with auto-computed start date and urgency
Daily Task Planner with top-priority focus list and motivational nudges
Simulated notification system with bell icon, unread count, and dropdown
Fixed navbar, collapsible sidebar, and dark mode toggle
localStorage persistence for assignments and behavior profile
